column1: # SF voting-age population (VAP) and eligible (citizen) voting-age population
# VAP is now REAL census data via IPUMS NHGIS (not estimated). Eligibility basis:
# is MALE 21+. For 1978-2026 the eligible (citizen) figure is PUBLISHED by the CA
# Secretary of State - see sf_registration_eligible*.csv; don't estimate those.
# citizen_eligible: native+naturalized (citizens) where census citizenship exists
#   (1900 real; 1910 approx); 1920-1970 = VAP x assumed citizen share (~0.78->0.90
#   anchored to 1910 ~0.76 and 1990 ~0.80 with a low-immigration mid-century peak) -
#   FLAGGED estimate; 1978+ from the SoS (not repeated here).
# National Historical Geographic Information System: Version 20.0 [dataset].
